events.title: Forest Blizzard（APT28）利用DNS劫持窃取Microsoft Office令牌
events.summary: Forest Blizzard（APT28）利用老旧路由器漏洞进行DNS劫持，大规模窃取Microsoft Office用户的OAuth认证令牌，影响超过18,000个网络和200多个组织，主要目标是政府机构。

events.title: Operation Neusploit targeting Central and Eastern European countries
events.summary: APT28, linked to Russia's military intelligence (GRU), conducted a campaign named 'Operation Neusploit' against countries in the Central and Eastern European region. The attack used a multi-stage infection chain to deliver malicious backdoors.

events.title: 针对国家关键基础设施的间谍破坏活动
events.summary: APT28-Sandworm利用Roundcube-RDP-edge设备漏洞和Wiper-OT模块，采用传统的间谍破坏并行策略威胁国家关键基础设施。
